div.p: On March 9, 1951, Mr. Dulles testified before the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, meeting in Executive Session, on issues involved in the negotiation of the Japanese Peace Treaty. For transcript of this testimony, see Executive Sessions of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee (Historical Series), volume III, part 1, 82d Congress, 1 Session, 1951 (Washington: Government Printing Office, 1976), pages 259–297.
